criteria_verification.criterion_text: No I/O at import beyond the logger reference; no LLM calls.
criteria_verification.evidence: The module imports only stdlib (enum, logging, typing) and pydantic — no network or filesystem access at import. There is no module-level logger creation; logger is supplied by the caller. TestImportPurity reloads the module under patched builtins.open and socket.socket and verifies neither is invoked, plus asserts __all__ is exactly the three documented symbols.
